category_sources: source_facts.description says it authenticates in browser using OAuth; official README describes secure OAuth authentication for GitHub, GitLab, and Bitbucket.

docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the project's primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/hickford/git-credential-oauth, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OAuth browser authentication; official GitHub topics include git, usable-security, and git-credential-helper.
